mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_comment(book_id, user_id, content, status, created_at) VALUES(#{bookId}, #{userId}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.book_id AS bookId, c.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.username AS username, c.content, DATE_FORMAT(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM book_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.book_id = #{bookId} AND c.status = 0 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE book_comment SET status = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
